entries.name: test_add_exercise_with_sets_and_reps
entries.description: Test adding exercise with specific sets and reps.

entries.name: test_add_exercise_with_weight
entries.description: Test adding exercise with weight specification.

entries.name: test_add_simple_exercise
entries.description: Test adding a simple exercise with real LLM.

entries.name: test_error_handling
entries.description: Test that errors are handled gracefully.
entries.error: AssertionError: 'empty' not found in 'command or image required'

entries.name: test_multiple_exercises
entries.description: Test adding multiple exercises in one command.

entries.name: test_question_without_changes
entries.description: Test asking a question that doesn't modify the workout.

entries.name: test_search_exercises_tool
entries.description: Test that the search_exercises tool works.

entries.name: test_full_conversation
entries.description: Manual test showing full AI conversation.

entries.name: test_agent_responds_after_tool_failure
entries.description: Agent should produce a text response even if a tool returns an error.

entries.name: test_followup_after_error_retains_context
entries.description: After a failed turn, a follow-up should still work correctly.

entries.name: test_modify_references_previous_workout
entries.description: Second message should modify the same workout, not create a new one.

entries.name: test_create_and_schedule_chains_both_tools
entries.description: 'Create a workout for tomorrow morning' should call both workouts AND schedule.

entries.name: test_biodata_query_calls_biodata_tool
entries.description: 'How did I sleep?' should call the biodata tool.

entries.name: test_biometrics_query_calls_biometrics_tool
entries.description: 'What are my HR zones?' should call biometrics tool.

entries.name: test_schedule_query_calls_schedule_get
entries.description: 'What's on my schedule?' should call schedule_get.

entries.name: test_workout_creation_calls_workouts_tool
entries.description: 'Create a workout' should call the workouts tool with action=create.

entries.name: test_final_verification
entries.description: Simple, complex, and modification commands via efficient 2-call agent.
